summary.layers: Honest baseline (261 stocks, historical costs, 3yr listing) + L2 15% Trailing Stop + L6 India VIX Regime
summary.assumptions: Honest+ = Honest baseline + only 2 additional layers (trailing stop, VIX). Low overfitting risk.
